'''Jontz Freight''' was a shipping corporation located on [[Dravian Starport]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Jontz offered a payment of 1,600 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for independent [[free-trader]]s to deliver a cargo of ten [[Metric ton/Legends|tons]] of [[Plasmaberry|plasmaberries]] to [[Dreffon IV]].<ref name="TSB" />
